author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Navigating Star Atlas - Character Customization

Star Atlas offers a truly unique approach to customization with limitless possibilities. In the second episode of Navigating Star Atlas, I sit down with Character Art Director, Hanno, to talk about all things customization.     

What is customization like in Star Atlas? What can you customize? What's unique about each faction and species? Not only do we answer all these questions but there's a cargo full of sneak peeks in the episode that you're not going to want to miss!  

 | Watch the episode now: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=88IEZVf7WOE
